title: Puerto Rico women's national ice hockey team
summary: The Puerto Rico women's national ice hockey team (Spanish: Selección femenina de hockey sobre hielo de Puerto Rico) is the national women's ice hockey team of Puerto Rico. The team is controlled by the Puerto Rico Ice Hockey Association and has been an associate member of the International Ice Hockey Federation (IIHF) since September 29, 2022.
text:
The Puerto Rico women's national ice hockey team (Spanish: Selección femenina de hockey sobre hielo de Puerto Rico) is the national women's ice hockey team of Puerto Rico. The team is controlled by the Puerto Rico Ice Hockey Association and has been an associate member of the International Ice Hockey Federation (IIHF) since September 29, 2022.

Puerto Rico women's national 3x3 team
The IIHF chose Brazil to host a women’s 3x3 tourney on October 17, for a tournament in November. Argentina, Colombia, Puerto Rico and Iran were announced as participants. The event would mark Puerto Rico's first ever IIHF event.

2024 Roster: Allegra Jenkins, Alyssa Jimenez, Eva Macci-Garcia, Jocelyn Modl, Liv Bernard, Maya Montalvo, Sabrina Honeycutt.
